description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, finished in a deep green color with a glossy sheen. The body features two humbucker pickups, four gold control knobs, and a three-way toggle switch, all mounted on a carved top. The neck is set-in and has a rosewood fretboard with trapezoid inlays, leading up to a headstock with three tuning pegs on each side. The guitar is displayed on a black stand and is connected by a cable to a small black amplifier and a pedal, both resting on a glass-topped metal table. The back of the guitar is smooth and unadorned, with a visible electronics cavity cover and strap buttons. The overall setup suggests a ready-to-play configuration suitable for street performances or urban music sessions.
description: A glossy green, single-cutaway electric guitar with gold hardware, set on a stand and connected to an amplifier and pedal on a glass table.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green carved top, two humbucker pickups, four gold knobs, toggle switch, and the full fretboard with trapezoid inlays.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side profile of the guitar, the amplifier, and pedal on the glass table, with visible cable connections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth green back, electronics cavity cover, and the guitar stand supporting the instrument.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the thickness of the guitar body, the set neck joint, and the arrangement of the amplifier and pedal on the table.
attribute_headstock_design: Three-per-side tuning pegs, angled headstock, possible logo on face, classic Les Paul contour
